transcript.text: Hello, living in Lafayette Vlog, the 4th, 24th of April, 2013.
I got up at, my alarm clock went off at 6.
It goes off at 6 every day, but I went and laid in bed until like 6.30 or 7.
Went to bed at about 9.30 last night.
I'm still kind of needing a lot of sleep.
But before I was saying I got 13 hours of sleep, I got that wrong.
I got about 8 or 9 hours of sleep.
And I'm pretty much on the same schedule as my roommate, so that's pretty cool.
It looks sunny today, but it's still going to be kind of cold.
Today's dedicated to getting my YouTube channel organized, setting up the whole page.
I guess they've invited everybody to be a partner.
Everybody's now a YouTube partner, so it's pretty cool.
And then I'm going to figure out how to work my new bike computer here.
And then my little GPS watch, so I can use those with Strava.
And then set up a bicycle with a rack to be able to go to the supermarket and stuff without taking the car.
And maybe even lift some weights and maybe do some more videos.
So yeah, today's kind of a tying everything in my life together video.
I mean day.
Yeah.
So yeah.
That's about that.
It's 11.20 in the morning now, and I've been at it, so yeah.
Okay.
Peace out.
